message:
refactor(bundles): remove unused Copy icon import

Clean up unused import from lucide-react. The Copy icon was likely
intended for a copy-to-clipboard feature that was either removed or
implemented differently.

No functional changes - import cleanup only.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -4,7 +4,6 @@ import type { Metadata } from "next";
 import {
   ArrowLeft,
   Download,
-  Copy,
   Sparkles,
   Rocket,
   Code,
